schemes.title: Education Support Program
schemes.description: Financial aid for students pursuing higher education. Scholarships, tuition support, and mentorship programs are included.

schemes.title: Healthcare Assistance
schemes.description: Medical support and insurance coverage for families in need. Free checkups and emergency support included.

schemes.title: Startup Grants
schemes.description: Funding support for small businesses and startups. Mentorship, networking, and grants available.
